rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH CONNELLY VS. ELIZABETH MAGUIRE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 4, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS GRANTED. This action is barred by 1-year statute of limitations. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH CONNELLY VS. ELIZABETH MAGUIRE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 4, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT DANIEL BORNSTEIN's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS GRANTED. This action is barred by 1-year statute of limitations per Vafi v McCloskey (2011) 193 Cal.App.4th 874 and Lee v. Hanley (2015) 61 Cal.4th 1225. Plaintiff's reliance on Silas v. Arden (2012) 213 Cal.App.4th 75 is misplaced. At the time the cause of action accrued and the 1-year statute of limitations expired Vafi v McCloskey was the law in effect. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTREA INVESTMENTS AND TRADING LLC, VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 4, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC, FRANK NOLAN, and CARLOS CABARCOS' MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied re: punitive damages as to Defendant Cabarcos. Motion is otherwise granted. Request for punitive damages against corporate entity and Nolan is not supported by factual allegations; request for fees is not appropriate as demurrer to the cause of action for breach of contract is sustained, individual defendants are not parties to the contract and Plaintiff failed to allege facts re: mediation. Plaintiff did not propose any amendments to cure the defect and did not ask for leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTREA INVESTMENTS AND TRADING LLC, VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 4, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC, FRANK NOLAN, and CARLOS CABARCOS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is OVERRULED as to the cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty, cause of action for professional negligence and cause of action for indemnity, each element of these causes of action is sufficiently alleged. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to (1) constructive fraud cause of action. Plaintiff fails to allege facts as to non-disclosure to Plaintiff and intent to deceive Plaintiff; (2) breach of contract cause of action. Plaintiff fails to allege a contract with individual defendants and Plaintiff fails to allege facts in support of breach of any of the express provisions of the contract with the corporate defendant. Plaintiff did not propose any amendments to cure the defect and did not ask for leave to amend. = (501/REQ)
